response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and has no demonstrated background in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains; his C++ exposure is limited to academic/legacy NI LabWindows work over a decade ago, with no recent or relevant financial systems development.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated contributions to open-source and dev-ops tooling (CI/CD, Docker, GitLab)
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and public talks
concerns: No recent or professional C++ development on Windows platform as required
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — not aligned with core C++/SQL Server/Oracle mandate
